hero_title_2: Let's Find the Right AI Tool.
hero_subtitle: Describe a goal, a task, or a problem — our AI-powered search engine will instantly match you with the right tools, workflows, and assistants.
search_placeholder: Search AI tools... (e.g. code review, video editing)

no_results: No tools found matching your search criteria.
news_subtitle: Follow the latest developments, launches, and analysis in the industry.
academy_subtitle: Test your skills using AI tools and earn badges!
assistant_subtitle: Your smart assistant that selects the most suitable AI tools for you.
compare_subtitle: Compare features, pricing, and models of similar AI tools.
calculator_subtitle: Calculate API usage costs for different large language models (LLM).

advisor_welcome_1: Hello! I am the smart advisor of AiKlavuz. 🤖
advisor_welcome_2: Type the kind of AI tool you need, and I will recommend the most popular and suitable alternatives right away. (e.g., "free drawing tools" or "coding assistant")

advisor_conn_error: Connection error occurred. Please check your internet connection.
empty_profession_tools: No matching tools found for this profession yet.
error_loading_tools: An error occurred while loading tools.
prompt_realestate: I am a real estate agent, I want to create video ads with voiceover, and my budget is limited
prompt_socialmedia: I manage a social media account, can you recommend the best tools to prepare 10 weekly posts (image + text)?
prompt_developer: I am a software developer, list AI tools that will help me code and find code errors.
prompt_support: I want to set up an AI Chatbot customer representative for my company. Which no-code platforms can I use?

assistant_welcome_subtitle: Tell us what job you do or what you want to automate. Our AI assistant will select the best tools from our directory for you, listing usage steps and budget instantly.
assistant_textarea_placeholder: Ask your AI companion... (e.g. I am a realtor, I want to make video ads)
assistant_disclaimer_text: scans the current AI tools in our directory to create a custom budget and guide for you.
